summary: Dashboard UX overhaul fully tested. Fixed critical bug in remind endpoint (was not fetching participants from DB). All 9 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features working: header stats, financial summary, engagement cards with risk badges, progress bars, tabs, Relancer button, delete modal, workspace switcher, CTA navigation.

backend: GET /api/appointments/ - returns appointments with participants array
GET /api/appointments/ - appointments have all required dashboard fields
GET /api/appointments/ - participants have status for risk calculation
POST /api/appointments/{id}/remind - sends reminders to pending participants (after fix)
POST /api/appointments/{id}/remind - returns 400 when no pending participants
Appointments can be filtered by date (upcoming vs past)
frontend: Header stats show engagement count, at-risk count, total engaged amount
Financial summary cards show secured (€) and at-risk (€) amounts
CTA button says 'Créer un engagement' and navigates to /appointments/create
Tabs 'À venir' and 'Passés' work with correct counts (43 upcoming, 57 past)
Engagement cards show title, date, duration, type (physical/video), penalty amount
Engagement cards show participant progress bar with accepted/total count
'Relancer' button appears on cards with pending participants
'Voir détails' button navigates to appointment detail page
Cancel button closes delete modal without deleting

bug_fixed.issue: Endpoint was looking for participants in appointment document (appointment.get('participants', [])) but participants are stored in separate collection
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to fetch participants from db.participants collection using appointment_id

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (100 appointments: 43 upcoming, 57 past)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard UX overhaul complete. Key components: (1) OrganizerDashboard.js with header stats, financial summary, engagement cards, risk badges, progress bars, tabs, Relancer button. (2) POST /api/appointments/{id}/remind endpoint fixed to fetch participants from DB. (3) Risk calculation: secured = all accepted, high = <24h AND pending, medium = <48h OR pending. (4) Priority section only shows when high-risk items exist (none currently). (5) data-testid attributes: dashboard-title, dashboard-stats, financial-summary, secured-amount, at-risk-amount, create-appointment-btn, tab-upcoming, tab-past, appointment-card-{id}, risk-badge-{id}, progress-bar-{id}, view-details-{id}, remind-btn-{id}, delete-appointment-{id}, confirm-delete-btn, workspace-switcher-btn, workspace-dropdown.
